instruments.instrument_name: AI Structured Analysis Visualization Data And State Model
instruments.input: records, files, indexes, tables, project state, source state, and user decisions
instruments.operation: Heuer. Loads cognitive-bias and intelligence-analysis failure modes. CIA Tradecraft Primer. Loads structured analytic technique selection and use conditions. Pherson and Pherson. Loads practical tradecraft: indicators, ACH, key assumptions, diagnosticity, and challenge procedures. Tetlock. Loads judgment calibration, forecasting humility, and expert-performance limits. Kahneman. Loads bias, heuristics, and slow/fast cognition as an error-control vocabulary. A page-family source-use record exists. Final citation.
instruments.output: state model that explains what the tool remembers and what it refuses to infer
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires records, files, indexes, tables, project state, source state, and user decisions
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds state model that explains what the tool remembers and what it refuses to infer; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: state model that explains what the tool remembers and what it refuses to infer
instruments.status: Status: native public port complete for upload and navigation; substantive source-project verification remains limited by the source lineage ceiling and the.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept records, files, indexes, tables, project state, source state, and user decisions and produce state model that explains what the tool remembers and what it refuses.
instruments.verification_check: Run one analytic question through AI Structured Analysis Visualization Data And State Model; confirm evidence, assumptions, method decision, confidence limit, and human/AI delta.

instruments.instrument_name: AI Structured Analysis Visualization Core Instrument Panel
instruments.input: tool buttons, rooms, workflow steps, analytical controls, and review surfaces
instruments.operation: The working mechanism is to move from threat model to test condition, system behavior, error mode, human-review checkpoint, scoring rule, and release or rejection gate. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
